ads.author: Travis Cowley
ads.title: Twin Cobra Arcade OBO
ads.description: Everything works! Just needs to be dusted and cleaned up!!! Enjoy :) Twin Cobra is a popular 1987 vertical-scrolling shoot 'em up arcade game by Toaplan, where players pilot an attack helicopter to destroy waves of military enemies. It's known for its challenging difficulty, power-up system for different weapon types (like spread shot, laser, and straight shot), and limited smart bombs that clear bullets. The game was a commercial success and was ported to many home consoles, with a sequel, Twin Cobra II, released in 1995. Genre: Vertical-scrolling shooter (shmup). Objective: Pilot the "Twin Cobra" helicopter through 10 stages, defeating bosses at the end of each to overthrow an enemy dictator. Controls: 8-way joystick for movement and two buttons for primary fire and bombs. Weapons: Collect power-ups (red, green, blue, yellow) to change your main weapon's firing pattern (e.g., straight, laser, spread, cross). Bombs: A limited supply of powerful bombs that clear the screen of bullets and enemies. Difficulty: High, with increasing difficulty and enemy bullet speed over repeated loops.

ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Scott Knighton
ads.title: Williams MISS-O Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Williams MISS-O pinball machine. Super cool retro pool-themed artwork on the backglass and playfield. Lights are on, ready to play! Has coin slots for nickels and dimes, plus flipper buttons on both sides. Great piece for a game room.

ads.title: Gottlieb Devils Dare Pinball Machine Project
ads.description: Cabinet and populated playfield, no backbox.. in very good condition.. all wiring and mechs intact..
